CustomField.label: Trigger Layer
CustomField.description: The nepa_detected_protection_layer__c record whose detection triggered this specialist's auto-assembly onto the process team. Provides a full audit trail: which federal protection layer was found at the project location that required this discipline. Null for manually added team members.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: The detected protection layer (e.g., NWI Wetlands, USFWS Critical Habitat) that triggered this specialist's assignment to the team.
